bead.title: auth-jwt-pipeline: sign + verify with revocation cache + request extension
bead.description:
Implement the full JWT verification middleware in axon-server:
1. Parse Authorization: Bearer header
2. Verify signature (HS256 dev / RS256 prod via jsonwebtoken crate)
3. Check exp / nbf with 30s clock skew
4. Check jti against in-memory LRU cache → SQL fallback on miss
5. Compare aud against URL {tenant} segment
6. Resolve sub → User row; reject if suspended
7. Walk grants.databases[] for URL {database}; intersect ops with method-op
8. Install (user_id, tenant_id, grants) into axum request extension

Depends on: A2, A1. Blocks B2, C-phase, D-phase.

Test as you implement:
- Unit test per verification step (happy path + failure)
- Integration test hitting a dummy protected route with valid JWT → 200
- Revocation propagation: DELETE jti, wait 1s, request → 401 credential_revoked
- Clock skew: exp +5s accepted, exp -5s rejected
- INV-018 grant enforcement workload in axon-sim: random ops × random grants, assert intersection correctness under 1k seeds
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] Unit tests cover every verification step
- [ ] Integration test: valid JWT → 200 on dummy protected route
- [ ] Revocation propagates within 1s (LRU cache invalidation test)
- [ ] INV-018 axon-sim workload passes 1k seeds
- [ ] Request extension contains (user_id, tenant_id, grants) after middleware
- [ ] cargo test -p axon-server green
